title: ephemerantha calopogon
intro: Ephemerantha calopogon, also known as the green and gold or grass pink, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow and green flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ephemerantha calopogon include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, is used in herbal preparations such as salves and tinctures.
